name: AgentWatcher
description: Send compact Codex approval, completion, test, attention, and Desktop watcher fallback notifications to iPhone and Apple Watch through Bark.

interface.shortDescription: Send compact Codex notifications through Bark.
interface.longDescription: Send compact actionable Codex notifications to iPhone and Apple Watch through Bark when Codex waits for approval, finishes work, completes tests, or needs user attention. Includes a Desktop watcher fallback for automatic task-complete notifications when Stop hooks do not fire.
interface.defaultPrompt: Notify me through AgentWatcher when Codex needs approval, finishes work, completes tests, or needs my attention.
